source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The figure below shows a half-bridge voltage source inverter supplying an RL-load with \( R = 40 \, \Omega \) and \( L = \frac{0.3}{\pi} \, \text{H} \). The desired fundamental frequency of the load voltage is 50 Hz. The switch control signals of the converter are generated using sinusoidal pulse width modulation with a modulation index \( M = 0.6 \). At 50 Hz, the RL-load draws an active power of 1.44 kW. The value of DC source voltage \( V_{DC} \) in volts is
